tasks.name: Weekly Gaming Market Intelligence
tasks.description: Scan gaming charts, reviews, news, Reddit, and competitor games. Produce a market intelligence report with actionable insights.

trigger.description: Every Monday at 7 AM Israel time

task.instruction: Run weekly gaming market intelligence scan: 1) Check top free games on Play Store and App Store using web search. 2) Search Reddit r/androidgaming, r/iosgaming, r/indiegaming for trending topics. 3) Check gaming news for indie game trends. 4) Analyze top 5 competitor games in puzzle/casual category. 5) Produce a Market Intelligence Report as a GitHub issue with label 'market-intel'. Include: trending games, player complaints, feature requests, monetization trends, and 3 actionable recommendations for our games.

tasks.name: Daily Player Review Scanner
tasks.description: Check our published games for new reviews and player feedback

task.instruction: Check for new player reviews on our published games. Search Play Store for JellyBolt games. Look for negative reviews (1-2 stars) to identify bugs or UX issues. Look for positive reviews to identify what players love. Create a GitHub issue only if there are actionable findings — label 'player-feedback'.
